overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit urban environment at night. The clip transitions from a covered sidewalk to an open pedestrian plaza with palm trees, then ascends to an elevated glass-enclosed walkway with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk adjacent to elevated highway

events.description: slight turn to follow the green-haired character around a corner

agents.ego_description: following a character with bright green curly hair and cyan pants along the neon-lit sidewalk

notable_agents.action: character with green hair and cyan outfit walking steadily ahead of the camera

entered.detail: safety barrier separating sidewalk from street level below
building exterior with glowing blue and green window panels
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk next to an elevated highway structure in a dense cyberpunk city. The camera follows a character with distinctive green hair past neon-lit buildings while sparse traffic moves on the road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell descending to lower plaza level

events.description: descending stairs from street level into a lower open plaza area
green-haired character exits frame to the right and is no longer visible

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a lower pedestrian plaza, losing sight of the previous character

entered.detail: wide staircase with red painted walls descending to plaza level
tall palm trees visible at the bottom of the stairs in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the covered sidewalk down a wide concrete stairwell into a lower plaza. The environment shifts from enclosed to open as palm trees become visible at the bottom of the descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and neon signage

events.description: passing by seated NPCs resting near the building walls
slight weaving motion to navigate through scattered pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, navigating between pedestrians and palm trees while approaching a distant staircase

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground next to a glowing neon sign

entered.detail: tall palm tree with full foliage in the center of the plaza
bright cyan neon sign reading BLISS AMBASSADOR on building wall
rectangular planters with greenery lining the left side
elevated glass and steel walkway spanning across the plaza

segments.scene_description: Walking through a spacious pedestrian plaza featuring palm trees, wet reflective pavement, and neon signage. The area is populated with scattered pedestrians and street vendors, with an elevated pedestrian bridge visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway ascending to elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: beginning ascent of wide concrete staircase
approaching the glass-enclosed elevated walkway at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs following a character wearing a black vest with a white skull design on the back

notable_agents.action: character in black vest with skull emblem walking up stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: wide stairs with red painted side walls leading upward
enclosed pedestrian bridge with transparent glass walls visible at the top

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by red walls, transitioning from the open plaza to an elevated walkway. The camera follows a character in a distinctive skull vest while other pedestrians descend the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered pedestrian bridge with digital billboards

events.description: passing large rotating digital billboard displaying advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the elevated glass-enclosed corridor, passing digital displays and small vendor stalls

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with transparent glass walls and steel framework
large vertical digital screen displaying red and white advertisements
small shops with glowing neon signs and display windows
structural steel girders supporting the glass roof

segments.scene_description: Walking through an elevated glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge with views of the city skyline through the transparent walls. The corridor features digital billboards, small vendor stalls with neon lighting, and steel structural elements overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered sidewalk into an open plaza before ascending to a high-altitude glass walkway. It begins by following a green-haired character along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing neon-lit buildings and sparse traffic. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens up during a descent down a wide concrete stairwell, leading into a spacious pedestrian plaza filled with palm trees, wet reflective pavement, and street vendors. The scene then shifts as the camera follows a character in a skull vest up a wide staircase flanked by red walls, leaving the open plaza behind. Finally, the movement culminates in an elevated glass-enclosed bridge, where the view expands to the city skyline through transparent walls lined with digital billboards and neon vendor stalls.
